name: deepsec
description: AI-powered vulnerability scanner for any codebase

scripts.prepublishOnly: pnpm -w validate && node -e "const fs=require('node:fs');for(const f of ['dist/cli.mjs','dist/config.mjs','dist/config.d.ts','dist/sandbox/request-proxy.mjs','dist/docs/getting-started.md','dist/samples/webapp/deepsec.config.ts','SKILL.md','README.md','LICENSE','NOTICE']){if(!fs.existsSync(f)){console.error('Missing: '+f);process.exit(1)}}console.log('Pre-publish checks passed.')"
